semantic.role: Preflight validation module for the ArchSpine publish pipeline, guarding against missing runtime state and misconfiguration before a publish operation can proceed.
responsibilities: Assert that the .spine directory exists as a prerequisite for any publish operation.
Assert that all required snapshot index files exist under .spine/index and that no lock conflict exists (i.e. no other process holds the snapshot lock).
Warn the user when the current artifact strategy is set to 'local', which is inappropriate for publishing and may cause misdelivery.
outOfScope: This module does not perform the actual publish or snapshot generation.
It does not validate the contents or integrity of the snapshot files beyond existence.
It does not modify any runtime state or configuration.
invariants: Publish must fail if .spine directory is absent.
Publish must fail if any required snapshot index file is missing.
Publish must fail if the snapshot lock is held by another process (lock conflict).
the artifact strategy must not be 'local' when publishing in a CI context.
The service-runtime-boundary rule is not violated as this module is not view-specific.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provides pre-flight checks for the publish pipeline to ensure the runtime state is safe and consistent before proceeding.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of pre-flight validations for the publish pipeline; introduced to guard against missing runtime state and misconfiguration.

publicSurface.description: Verifies that the .spine directory exists at the project root, throwing an error if not. Called before any publish action.
Checks that the .spine/index directory and all required snapshot index files exist, and that no other process holds the snapshot lock. Throws on missing files or lock conflict.
Reads the artifact strategy from config and issues a warning if it is set to 'local', which is not suitable for publication. Uses the provided RuntimeIO for output.

English.role: Preflight validation module for the ArchSpine publish pipeline, guarding against missing runtime state and misconfiguration before a publish operation can proceed.
responsibilities: Assert that the .spine directory exists as a prerequisite for any publish operation.
Assert that all required snapshot index files exist under .spine/index and that no lock conflict exists (i.e. no other process holds the snapshot lock).
Warn the user when the current artifact strategy is set to 'local', which is inappropriate for publishing and may cause misdelivery.
outOfScope: This module does not perform the actual publish or snapshot generation.
It does not validate the contents or integrity of the snapshot files beyond existence.
It does not modify any runtime state or configuration.

exports.name: warnIfPublishingFromLocalStrategy
exports.signature:
warnIfPublishingFromLocalStrategy(
  rootDir: string,
  runtimeIO: RuntimeIO = defaultRuntimeIO,
)
